svg.title: Everline v0.1 components master sheet
svg.desc: Consolidated candidate vector sheet combining existing and newly drafted Everline components.

g.text: Everline Design Language — Components Master Sheet
v0.1 candidate · consolidates existing + batch 1 components · source: everline_p1.svg measurements, design-system-v0.1-draft.md
48 px height · pill radius 24 px · padding-inline 24 px
track 96 × 48 px · thumb 40 px · 4 px optical inset
32 × 32 px outer · 20 px selected indicator · always used within a radio group
closed 180 × 48 px · disclosure 48 px · menu row 48 px · needs transition animation (per source note)
48 px height · radius 24 px · padding-inline 24 px
source reference strip, not an interactive component (8 verified colors)
40 px compact height · 16 px horizontal padding · pill radius · reproduced from works/everline-agent-components-v0.1.svg
removable：尾端圖示需有獨立命中區與可存取名稱
96 px minimum height · 16 px radius · semantic accent rail · reproduced from works/everline-agent-components-v0.1.svg
重新連線後會繼續處理尚未上傳的變更。
請保留此頁並檢查連線，避免遺失尚未同步的內容。
這項狀態不代表成功語意，僅確認本機草稿仍可使用。
candidate · 48 px trigger height · menu row 48 px · menu surface reuses background-subdued
candidate · 40 px row height · shown open (trigger reuses Icon button / Button)
candidate · same-level content switch · 2 px selected indicator
candidate · default placement is beside the trigger; falls back to below near a viewport edge
candidate · blocks current flow · 16 px container radius
確認建立後即可開始新增任務與欄位。
此操作無法復原，任務內容將永久刪除。
candidate · transient non-blocking feedback · rounded surface
Observed colors are confirmed; spacing and typography remain candidate values pending further product integration.

• Existing components (Button…Inline alert) are faithful reconstructions from verified measurements in docs/design-system-v0.1-draft.md, not pixel copies of works/72ppi/everline_p1.svg (its text is outlined and not reusable).
• Font family confirmed as Noto Sans TC by the user on 2026-07-19; no longer a candidate value.
• Select/Combobox, Menu/Context menu, Tabs, Tooltip, Modal/Dialog, Toast/Snackbar are new batch-1 candidates; states beyond what is drawn here still need definition.
• This file does not replace works/everline_p1.ai. works/everline-agent-components-v0.1.svg is superseded by this file for viewing purposes but is kept as a historical snapshot.
